messages.content: You triage Driftwood (a SaaS task-tracker) support tickets. Reply with ONLY a JSON object with keys: category (string), priority (low|medium|high|urgent), sentiment (negative|neutral|positive), needs_human (boolean), draft_reply (string). No prose, no code fences.

Subject: Invoice charged twice this month

My card was charged $49 twice on June 3rd for the same Pro subscription. Please refund the duplicate. Account billing email is on file.

response.content: {"category":"billing","priority":"high","sentiment":"negative","needs_human":true,"draft_reply":"Sorry about the double charge. I've escalated the duplicate $49 charge from June 3rd to billing for a refund — you'll get a confirmation within one business day."}
